title: Senior Travel Consultant (Long Haul)
description:
About us
Holiday Tribe is a Great Place To Work® Certified™ travel-tech company headquartered in Gurugram. Backed by leading VC firms like Powerhouse Ventures and GSF, and having recently raised pre series A funding, we are growing rapidly and setting the stage for the next phase of scale.We specialize in curated leisure travel experiences across 30+ global destinations, combining deep human expertise with a bold vision of building cutting-edge AI and technology that will transform how Indians plan and experience their holidays.Recognized as the Emerging Holiday Tech Company at the India Travel Awards 2023, we’ve also partnered with international tourism boards to bring world-class experiences to Indian travelers.At our core, we are a fun, performance-driven workplace on a mission to build the next big thing in travel — making holiday planning faster, smarter, and unforgettable.
Role Description
The Holiday Sales Advisor (Long Haul) role is a full-time on-site role located in Jaipur and Gurugram. The Advisor will be responsible for promoting and selling customized travel packages, managing bookings, and ensuring customer satisfaction.
Key Responsibility Areas
• Connect with customers to understand holiday requirements for Long Haul & Short Haul Destinations(Europe, Nordic Region, Australia and New Zealand).
• Design a customized itinerary based on customers’ requirements
• Ability to convince customers and deliver the assigned sales targets consistently
• Pro-actively identify new business opportunities to increase sales
• Represent company values while speaking to customers
• Provide exceptional customer service
• Working with cross-functional teams like Ops, product and supply to achieve organizational goals
Desired Attributes
• Passion for travel
• Demonstrate personal drive to learn and evolve
• Strong interpersonal skills
• Excellent verbal and written communication skills in English
• Strong attention to detail
• Can work with start-ups or a fast-paced environment

title: Assistant Manager - Graphic Design
description:
About Holiday Tribe
Holiday Tribe is a next-generation travel tech brand creating personalised, seamless, and
experience-led holidays for modern Indian travellers. We combine technology, expert insights, and
curated travel experiences to simplify travel planning and booking. Our marketing approach blends
strong storytelling with performance-driven execution to build meaningful, long-term customer
connections.
Role Overview
We are looking for a Graphic Designer to support Holiday Tribe’s marketing initiatives across paid
marketing and brand communication. This role focuses on creating visually strong, conversion-oriented
creatives while also supporting brand storytelling across digital channels. You will work closely with
marketing and performance stakeholders to deliver high-quality creative output at speed.
Key Responsibilities
● Design high-performing creatives for paid marketing campaigns across Meta and Google
● Design emailers, WhatsApp banners, and CRM communication creatives
● Support the brand team with social media collaterals and campaign creatives
● Adapt creatives across formats while maintaining brand consistency
● Collaborate with performance marketers to optimise creatives using campaign insights
● Manage multiple design requests with fast turnaround timelines
Technical Skills
● Adobe Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign
● Working knowledge of Figma
● Understanding of Meta & Google ad creative formats
● Strong layout, typography, and visual hierarchy skills

title: Assistant Manager - MICE
description:
About Us
Holiday Tribe is a Great Place To Work® Certified™ travel-tech company headquartered in Gurugram. Backed by leading VC firms like Powerhouse Ventures and GSF, and having recently raised pre series A funding, we are growing rapidly and setting the stage for the next phase of scale.
We specialize in curated leisure travel experiences across 30+ global destinations, combining deep human expertise with a bold vision of building cutting-edge AI and technology that will transform how Indians plan and experience their holidays.
Recognized as the Emerging Holiday Tech Company at the India Travel Awards 2023, we’ve also partnered with international tourism boards to bring world-class experiences to Indian travelers.
At our core, we are a fun, performance-driven workplace on a mission to build the next big thing in travel — making holiday planning faster, smarter, and unforgettable.
Role Overview
Holiday Tribe is looking for a commercially strong MICE professional to manage costing, RFQs, proposals, and supplier partnerships for corporate and group travel programs.
Key Responsibilities
  • Prepare accurate costings and structured costing sheets for MICE programs
  • Handle corporate & MICE RFQs and create customized proposals
  • Coordinate with Finance, Operations, Sales, and Design teams
  • Negotiate supplier rates, contracts, and value adds (domestic & international)
  • Review supplier invoices and benchmark pricing against market standards
Skills & Experience
  • 3–7 years of experience in MICE / Corporate Travel
  • Strong commercial, costing, and negotiation skills
  • Proficient in Excel and managing multiple RFQs
  • Knowledge of domestic & international MICE destinations
  • Experience with MICE agencies, DMCs, or corporate travel companies preferred

title: Team Lead - Customer Success
description:
About Us
Holiday Tribe is a Great Place To Work® Certified™ travel-tech company headquartered in Gurugram. Backed by leading VC firms like Powerhouse Ventures and GSF, and having recently raised pre series A funding, we are growing rapidly and setting the stage for the next phase of scale.
We specialize in curated leisure travel experiences across 30+ global destinations, combining deep human expertise with a bold vision of building cutting-edge AI and technology that will transform how Indians plan and experience their holidays.
Recognized as the Emerging Holiday Tech Company at the India Travel Awards 2023, we’ve also partnered with international tourism boards to bring world-class experiences to Indian travelers.
At our core, we are a fun, performance-driven workplace on a mission to build the next big thing in travel — making holiday planning faster, smarter, and unforgettable.

﻿Role Overview
At Holiday Tribe, the Team Lead – Customer Success will own the end-to-end traveler experience, ensuring every customer interaction reflects empathy, responsiveness, and resolution excellence. This role requires a strong people leader with an exceptional customer-service mindset, capable of balancing high-volume chat support with quality voice interactions.

Key Responsibilities
• Lead, coach, and motivate the Customer Success team to deliver consistent, on-brand HT experiences
• Drive proactive customer coordination across bookings, travel journeys, and post-travel support
• Own customer escalations and crisis situations, ensuring swift, empathetic, and accountable resolution
• Oversee chat-based customer support (70%) and voice interactions (30%), ensuring quality and efficiency
• Ensure CRM accuracy, process adherence, and seamless implementation of HT service workflows
• Handle complex customer conversations and guide the team on effective complaint resolution
• Plan & manage productivity, call/chat quality, and continuous team coaching.

Key Skills & Capabilities
• Exceptional customer service orientation with a strong customer-first mindset
• Proven experience managing chat-heavy service operations with voice support exposure
• Strong hands-on knowledge of CRM systems and service processes
• Demonstrated people leadership, coaching, and team development skills
• Ability to remain calm, solution-focused, and empathetic in high-pressure customer scenarios

title: SDE-II || Node.js
description:
About Us
Holiday Tribe is a Great Place To Work® Certified™ travel-tech company headquartered in Gurugram. Backed by leading VC firms like Powerhouse Ventures and GSF, and having recently raised pre series A funding, we are growing rapidly and setting the stage for the next phase of scale.
We specialize in curated leisure travel experiences across 30+ global destinations, combining deep human expertise with a bold vision of building cutting-edge AI and technology that will transform how Indians plan and experience their holidays.
Recognized as the Emerging Holiday Tech Company at the India Travel Awards 2023, we’ve also partnered with international tourism boards to bring world-class experiences to Indian travelers.

At our core, we are a fun, performance-driven workplace on a mission to build the next big thing in travel — making holiday planning faster, smarter, and unforgettable.

We’re looking for a Node.js Backend Developer who can help us build high-performance APIs and workflows that power our planning and booking assistant.

What You’ll Do
  • Build and maintain backend services using Node.js (Express) and integrate them with travel APIs (flights, hotels, activities).
  • Implement RESTful APIs and services to support AI-powered trip planning and booking.
  • Work closely with the frontend and AI orchestration layers to enable seamless end-user experience.
  • Design clean, reusable modules to integrate with third-party booking platforms.
  • Optimize performance and scalability of real-time query systems.
  • Collaborate with product managers and DevOps to ensure stable deployments and quick iterations.

What You Bring
  • 3+ years of backend development experience using Node.js.
  • Strong understanding of JavaScript/TypeScript, RESTful APIs, and async programming.
  • Experience with databases (MongoDB, PostgreSQL, or MySQL).
  • Familiarity with message queues (e.g. Redis, RabbitMQ, Kafka) websockets and caching mechanisms.
  • Ability to write clean, modular, testable code.
  • Bonus: Worked on travel, booking, or real-time systems.

Perks
  • Work with a fast-moving team building futuristic travel tools.
  • Shape backend architecture for a high-growth product.
  • Learn and contribute to AI-agent orchestration pipelines.
  • Competitive pay and ESOPs.

title: Manager - Design
description:
About Holiday Tribe:
Holiday Tribe is a Great Place To Work® Certified™ travel-tech company headquartered in Gurugram. Backed by leading VC firms like Powerhouse Ventures and GSF, and having recently raised pre series A funding, we are growing rapidly and setting the stage for the next phase of scale. We specialize in curated leisure travel experiences across 30+ global destinations, combining deep human expertise with a bold vision of building cutting-edge AI and technology that will transform how Indians plan and experience their holidays.

Recognized as the Emerging Holiday Tech Company at the India Travel Awards 2023, we’ve also partnered with international tourism boards to bring world-class experiences to Indian travelers. At our core, we are a fun, performance-driven workplace on a mission to build the next big thing in travel — making holiday planning faster, smarter, and unforgettable.

Experience
  • 5+ years of experience in Graphic Design
  • Bonus if you have hands-on experience in Motion Design
  • A strong portfolio showcasing both explorations and shipped work is mandatory
  • Prior experience with consumer brands, especially in luxury or travel, is highly valued

What We’re Looking For
• A deep obsession with craft—visual and motion design
You believe great design is often invisible, but deeply felt when it’s missing
• Strong proficiency in Illustrator / Affinity / After Effects (or equivalent tools)
  • More importantly, you know how to use these tools to solve real-world problems
  • Bonus if you have strong illustration or drawing skills
• Independent, resourceful, and biased toward action and ownership
• A true self-starter—results-driven, curious, innovative, and comfortable taking initiative and risks
• Highly collaborative, with the ability to manage multiple stakeholders and projects simultaneously
• Strong system-level thinking—you design solutions that are:
Scalable
  • Easy to implement across platforms
  • Usable by multiple teams and stakeholders

Role & Responsibilities
  • Shape and evolve the brand identity and brand voice of the organization
  • Work closely with Design, Marketing, and internal stakeholders to deliver a consistent, aspirational brand experience across all touchpoints
  • Collaboratively build and strengthen the brand philosophy and promise
  • Partner with external agencies and vendors to ensure consistency and quality in brand execution
  • Own visual consistency across digital, marketing, and communication platforms

title: Senior Executive - Customer Success
description:
Role Overview:
The Customer Success Executive plays a key role in enhancing the overall customer journey by ensuring every traveler experiences a smooth, personalized, and memorable holiday. This role focuses on building trust with customers post-booking, proactively supporting them at every stage of their journey, and adding value through timely communication, attention to detail, and thoughtful service delivery.

Key Responsibilities:
Own the end-to-end customer journey post booking, ensuring a seamless and stress-free experience
Act as the primary relationship manager for customers, addressing queries and concerns proactively
Coordinate travel documents, vouchers, itineraries, and confirmations with a focus on clarity and ease for the customer
Anticipate customer needs and provide timely updates to enhance confidence and satisfaction
Work closely with internal teams and vendors to ensure smooth execution of services
Handle escalations with empathy and solution-oriented thinking
Ensure customers feel supported, informed, and valued throughout their travel experience
Collect feedback and contribute insights to continuously improve customer experience standards

What We’re Looking For:
Strong communication and relationship-building skills
Good knowledge of short-haul travel destinations and customer expectations
A proactive, customer-first mindset with high attention to detail
Ability to manage multiple customers while maintaining service quality
Passion for creating meaningful and memorable travel experiences
